title: frolovia formosana
intro: Frolovia formosana, a lesser-known flowering plant native to Taiwan, belongs to the family Compositae and is also known as Formosan tree daisy. The medicinal properties of Frolovia formosana are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and protection against infections. Frolovia formosana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to harness its potential health benefits.
